title: Floodwater home re-entry boundary
summary: Check official clearance, structural movement, electricity, gas, sewage, chemicals, animals, mould, and safe access before entry.
content: Check official clearance, structural movement, electricity, gas, sewage, chemicals, animals, mould, and safe access before entry. Delay entry when power, structure, contamination, or ventilation cannot be made safe. Do not allow children, pets, or unprotected people into contaminated flood areas.
